title: psychotria heterosticta subsp. plurinervata
intro: Psychotria heterosticta subsp. plurinervata, also known as the Plurinervate Psychotria, is a subspecies of plant in the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of the plant include relieving congestion, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
